mapper.insert:
insert into tender_project_category ( is_classifyed, project_id, code_level1, name_level1, code_level2, name_level2, code_level3, name_level3, created_time, updated_time ) values
(#{item.isClassifyed}, #{item.projectId}, #{item.codeLevel1}, #{item.nameLevel1}, #{item.codeLevel2}, #{item.nameLevel2}, #{item.codeLevel3}, #{item.nameLevel3}, NOW(), NOW())
